data.title: CZ: On-chain prediction markets and AI will drive more demand for oracles
data.description: CZ posted on Binance Square, saying, "We need more oracles; one or two are far from enough. We need multiple data sources. On-chain prediction markets will generate more of this demand, and the same goes for AI."

data.title: Trump’s Sons’ Venture, American Bitcoin, Achieves Profitability In Q3–A Closer Look
data.description:
In the latest financial report, American Bitcoin (ABTC), co-founded by Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. , has announced significant profits for the third quarter (Q3) of the year. The company, operating as a miner and buyer of the world’s largest digital asset, experienced a profit boost due to improved margins. American Bitcoin Surpasses Previous Earnings During Q3, American Bitcoin reported a revenue of $64
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/trumps-sons-venture-american-bitcoin-achieves-profitability-in-q3-a-closer-look/

data.title: USDC Circulation Sees Modest Increase Over Seven Days
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 6.4 billion USDC and redeemed around 6.3 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to November 13. This activity resulted in a net increase of about 100 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 75.4 billion, backed by reserves totaling approximately $75.6 billion. These reserves include around $9.5 billion in cash and $66.2 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: "Brother Machi" added 350 ETH to his long position in the past 8 hours, and his overall position is currently showing a floating loss of 195%.
data.description: Hyperinsight monitoring shows that Huang Licheng, known as "Maji Dage," just added 200 ETH to his long position, bringing his total long position to 350 ETH in the past 8 hours. Currently, his 25x leveraged long position in ETH is showing a floating loss of $1.925 million (-195%), with a total position of 7750 ETH and a position size of $24.6 million. The average entry price was $3422, and the liquidation price was $3047. Furthermore, he has placed limit orders for a total of 475 ETH in the $3188-$3400 range to close his long position.

data.title: Aster: The S4 buyback program is about to begin; the S3 buyback expenditure was nearly 49.3 million USDT.
data.description: Perpetual contract DEX Aster announced on the X platform that the S3 buyback program is nearing completion, with a total expenditure of 49,299,999 USDT and a total ASTER token buyback volume of 47,065,447. Aster also announced that the S4 buyback program will begin soon, with details on buyback fee allocation, dates, and addresses to be released shortly.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $492 million yesterday, marking the third consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $492 million yesterday (November 14th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF (BTC), with a net inflow of $4.1722 million. BTC's historical total net inflow has reached $1.677 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (IBIT), with a net outflow of $463 million. IBIT's historical total net inflow has reached $63.789 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $125.345 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.67%. Historical cumulative net inflows have reached $58.852 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $178 million yesterday, marking the fourth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $178 million yesterday (November 14th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net outflow of $173 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $13.449 billion. This was followed by Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of $4.6306 million. ETHE's historical total net outflow has reached $4.885 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $19.999 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Ethereum market capitalization) of 5.42%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $13.133 billion.

data.description:

International Trade Commission (ITC) has now agreed to scrutinize whether Apple’s redesigned blood oxygen feature in newer watches still infringes […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/apple-import-ban-patent-smartwatch-tech/

data.title: Balancer Hacker Transfers ETH to Tornado Cash
data.description: According to Odaily, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed that the hacker responsible for the Balancer breach has begun transferring Ethereum (ETH) to Tornado Cash.
